title: malva lusitanica subsp. minoricensis
intro: Malva lusitanica subsp. minoricensis, also known as the Minorcan mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Malva lusitanica subsp. minoricensis include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as soothing irritated skin and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
